title: carex callitrichos
intro: Carex callitrichos, also known as the rough sedge, is a type of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating skin irritations and infections. The plant's health benefits extend to its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Carex callitrichos can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
